Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}Oh, you're that transfer student. You gonna join a club or something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}Oh yeah? You won't be able to join right away though. I hear a lot of them are at max capacity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}Well, just keep an eye out for an open spot. They might start recruiting again in late April.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}Well, club activities suck anyway. You have to socialize and be considerate of other people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 306}I guess it's a good way to make new friends, but I also just wanna enjoy high school, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
